issue.message: Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Consider adding a `<queries>` declaration to your manifest when calling this method; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("hits"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("new"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("downloaded"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Insecure Base Configuration
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance

Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
Hardcoded string "+", should use `@string` resource
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
